authorization.decision: Owner retained the private Governance Deploy Key design and explicitly authorized controlled Stage 7 completion with serial new first-attempt protected dispatches and no artificial calendar or manual-approval blocker
authorization.scope: Stage 7 T0703 only: the protected T0702 PASS satisfies the M3 predecessor. The first four exact-main M3 attempts had zero observed effects. The fifth reached the closed MUTATION_FAILED aggregate only after Raw plus Processed recovery; independent checks observed processed-current ZERO to ONE and Gmail Trash aggregate plus one, but exact-source attribution remains unclaimed. The sixth zero-write reconciliation recovered Raw then stopped at PROCESSED_PLAN with independently verified zero new effect. The current Run Contract authorizes one repaired exact-main delivery and one attempt-1 dispatch that recovers historical Gmail label state from the existing encrypted Processed envelope before replay. It selects exactly one verified Trash source backed by the sole pointer, performs Raw and Processed recovery plus second verification, makes Gmail and private-repository writes unreachable, forbids rerun or any failed-head redispatch, and does not authorize T0704 or final publication.

precedence: machine/contracts/task_graph.json defines formal task completion only
machine/status/latest.json is the sole current cross-dimensional delivery status
evidence/tasks and machine/stages are source records, not overall status authorities
machine/facts and the seven human documents are deterministic derivatives

dimensions.evidence_integrity: Schema, path, task, stage-local acceptance, final Acceptance and prohibition bindings validate.
dimensions.mechanism_implementation: Local or synthetic mechanism evidence exists; this does not satisfy a protected Oracle.
dimensions.formal_task_completion: Only the frozen task_graph status and its final Acceptance pass gate control this dimension.
dimensions.protected_oracles: Only protected observations with valid provenance can change NOT_RUN.
dimensions.final_acceptance: Only the exact 34 Acceptance Oracles can pass this dimension.
dimensions.production_readiness: Requires all formal tasks, protected Oracles and final Acceptance gates; local evidence cannot promote it.
dimensions.publication: Remains LOCAL_ONLY_NOT_PUBLISHED until the owner-ordered final clean snapshot publication.
